content.en:
When Ye Tian was hidden, in the fourth round of assessment world, many god-level assessors were eliminated one by one by the powerful creatures of this world, and even the first-grade Eternal Ancient level powerhouses were difficult to compete with once they encountered danger.

Among the mountains.

Ye Tian hid quietly, he didn't have the arrogance to explore the surrounding situation, because in this way, he might expose himself.

Rather than so, it is better to hide like this.

But obviously, it was impossible for the Yuangu Hall to let him hide all the time.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian felt the aura of danger, and a huge creature appeared in the sky above the mountain range where Ye Tian was.

This is a huge creature similar to a kun, and its aura has reached the great god level, and it is not an ordinary great god level, but an incomparably terrifying great god-level powerhouse.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian thought that he was not the opponent of this creature.

"Roaring !!!"

The creature roared, and immediately sent out a column of water towards the mountain range where Ye Tian was.

This column of water bombarded down, shattering countless mountain peaks as well.

As soon as possible, Ye Tian fled, using his god-level spatial talent to keep teleporting, trying to avoid this creature.

But this creature obviously discovered Ye Tian's existence, and actually pursued him.

Fortunately, the speed of this creature was not a strong point, and it failed to catch up with Ye Tian, who had a god-level spatial talent, so that Ye Tian successfully escaped.

Through this matter, Ye Tian affirmed one thing.

The creatures of this world should be made illusory, not real creatures, because he did not sense the existence of talent from these creatures.

The previous cursed beasts had talents, but this creature didn't, but it showed that it was a real creature.

Therefore, this creature is definitely not real, but illusory, but it is so real that it is difficult for Ye Tian to identify it with his physical body and divine sense, but no matter how real a creature is, there is no way to hide Ye Tian's replication talent.

In addition, these creatures should have the ability to perceive outsiders, perhaps the Yuan Gu Temple gave these creatures permissions, but in this way, no matter how he changes, there is no way to avoid these creatures.

Once these creatures get close to him, they will discover his presence and attack him.

Therefore, it is impossible to avoid the danger of hiding, but it is even more dangerous if you run around.

In the case just now, if it were other highnesses, there would be absolutely no escape.

Next, every once in a while, Ye Tian would encounter an attack, and the creatures that attacked Ye Tian were all strong people above the Great God level, and none of them were ordinary Great God Level.

So, Ye Tian fled again and again, and almost died several times.

With the passage of time, the number of god-level assessors in this world has become smaller and smaller, and even His Royal Highness the Blood Wind of the Demon Race has been eliminated in an accident, and his luck is really not good.

In a forest.

Ye Tian hid here, thinking that he could stay here a little longer, but he didn't expect to encounter even more terrifying creatures.

Bang!!!

In the void, a giant python poked out, aimed at Ye Tian, and launched an attack.

That powerful aura has already surpassed the great god level and reached the galaxy level, and it is an invincible level among the galaxy levels, and it is estimated that even a galaxy-level powerhouse like Jin Chen Zhenjun can't beat this giant python.

Ye Tian raised his knife and slashed it hard, but the knife qi slashed at the body of this giant python, as if a wooden knife was slashed on steel, and it shattered in an instant, and it didn't hurt this creature at all.

At the moment when Ye Tian was about to be eliminated, Ye Tian activated the substitute death talent, transforming the position of the main body and the substitute death clone.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's substitute death clone was annihilated by the giant python, but Ye Tian's body left here and came to another place.

......

"Fortunately, I prepared early and left the substitute death clone here, otherwise I would definitely be eliminated!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The only pity is that the death substitution talent can't be activated again in a short time, and if Ye Tian encounters danger next time, he will really be eliminated.

However, Ye Tian's luck was good, and he didn't encounter much danger in the next day.

But the next day, Ye Tian was very unlucky, and he encountered a galaxy-level creature, the other party just glanced at Ye Tian, Ye Tian completely lost consciousness, and when he came back to his senses, he had already come to a big hall.

Obviously, he has already been eliminated.

"I wonder if it's the one who survived the longest?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, the voice of the machine spirit came: "Assessor, congratulations on becoming the second-longest surviving god-level, you can get your own reward, go and choose!"

"Second time?"

Ye Tian was not disappointed, the fourth round of assessment is not only to assess strength, luck is also very important, if there are no other powerful creatures around, then there will be no death.

This kind of assessment with half luck, it is very good that he can get second, where is too much extravagance.

Soon, a bunch of treasures appeared in front of Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to choose one.

Ye Tian sensed it, and then chose a knife-shaped crystal that felt useful.

He didn't know what it was, but he took it when he felt it was useful.

When Ye Tian put away the knife-shaped crystal, he was teleported out of the Yuangu Palace, directly leaving the void where the Yuangu Hall was located, and returning to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

He didn't know if the Kunwu Supremes had come out, and he didn't ask, so he went to check his harvest as soon as possible.

First of all, the knife-shaped crystal, he didn't know what it was for, so he naturally had to check it first.

Soon, he learned the origin and usefulness of this knife-shaped crystal from the information contained in the knife-shaped crystal.

"The Heart of the Sword!"

This is the name of this crystal, which has a wide range of uses, it can be used to comprehend the sword path, and it can increase the speed of cultivating sword skills, but the most important use is to assist in condensing the origin of the law of the sword.

The heart of the sword spirit contains a natural sword origin, which is a priceless treasure, even if the supreme level swordsman encounters such a sword heart, he will definitely be moved.

"Good baby, my origin of the law of the sword has always been a little worse, and now that I have the heart of the sword spirit, I can completely condense the origin of the law of the sword, so that I will soon be able to perfect the Tianyue knife to the level of the strongest pinnacle-level sword dao master. And in the future, if you enter the area where the law is shielded, you can also exert the power of the sword path mastery, and you are not limited to the area. "

Ye Tian was extremely excited, and even began to refine and absorb the heart of the sword spirit, trying to break the last shackles with the help of the heart of the sword spirit, and condense the origin of the law of the sword.

Time passed slowly, and a year passed in a blink of an eye.

The powerhouses of all the races in the universe basically came out of the Yuan Gu Palace, and only a small number of supremes and masters remained, and they still stayed in the Yuan Gu Palace.

At this time, Ye Tian didn't have time to pay attention to these things, he had been absorbing and refining the heart of the sword spirit, and with the help of the heart of the sword spirit, he condensed the origin of his own sword law.

this day.

Wisps of the law of the sword were born from the inside of Ye Tian's body, and the more they gathered, there was a tendency to evolve into the origin of the law of the sword.

"It's going to work!"

Ye Tian was very excited.
